GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when a lead needs reminders for upcoming appointments or offers related to real estate properties.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: Ensure the reminder includes all relevant details such as date and time.
If the query is about sending reminders, use EmployeeCopilot__CreateAToDo.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only send reminders to leads about their upcoming appointments or offers. You aren't able to reschedule appointments or provide property details within this topic.
